script_text: A good definition tells two things.
What group is it in? And what is special about it?
Let us try defining a dog.
A dog is an animal. That is its group.
But not every animal is a dog.
A dog is an animal that barks and wags its tail. That is special about dogs!
An apple is a fruit. That is the group.
An apple is a fruit that is round and grows on a tree.
Now we have a clear definition!
Give the group name, and one special thing. That is a great definition!
Now you are ready to define words like a pro!
